authError.title: Authentication Failed
authError.tokenExchangeFailed: Failed to exchange authorization code for access token. The authentication service may be unavailable.
authError.noCode: No authorization code was received. The authentication process was interrupted.
authError.generic: An authentication error occurred. Please try again later.
authError.causeUnavailable: The authentication service is temporarily unavailable
authError.waitNote: Please wait before retrying to avoid overloading the authentication service.

suspension.title: Account Not Available
suspension.message: This account is not currently operational. Please contact support for assistance.

clients.name: Name
clients.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this client?

credential.testError: An error occurred while testing the credential

device.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this device?

generic.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

serviceClientPermissions.title: Service Client Permissions
serviceClientPermissions.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this service client permission?

config.blockAssignmentOnExpiredLicense: Block assignment when the driver's license is expired

alertSubscriptions.title: Alert Subscriptions
alertSubscriptions.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this subscription?
alertSubscriptions.invalidPrincipalId: The recipient id must be a valid GUID
alertSubscriptions.invalidContact: The contact does not match the selected channel format

notificationTemplates.title: Notification Templates
notificationTemplates.subject: Subject
notificationTemplates.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this template override?

publicLinks.title: Public Links
publicLinks.tokenWarning: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.

documentManagement.title: Documents
documentManagement.dropHere: Drag and drop a file here, or click to select
documentManagement.shareTokenWarning: Copy this link now. The token will not be shown again.

errors.featureDisabled: This feature is not enabled for your account.
errors.accountSuspended: This account is not currently operational.
errors.reportAccessDenied: You do not have permission to run this report.
errors.reportNotFound: The requested report could not be found.
errors.unsupportedReportFormat: This report does not support the requested format.
errors.reportRowLimitExceeded: This report returned too many rows. Narrow your filters or export to Excel.
errors.tripNotActive: This trip is not in progress, so the action cannot be recorded.
errors.tripAlreadyTerminal: This trip is already finished and can no longer be changed.
errors.tripInvalidTransition: That status change is not allowed from the trip’s current status.
errors.stopAlreadyDeparted: This stop has already been departed; its times cannot be changed.
errors.stopNotArrived: Record the arrival at this stop before recording the departure.
errors.tripStopsNotComplete: Some stops are still pending. Finish them, or complete the trip with the force option.
errors.podDocumentNotClean: The proof-of-delivery attachment has not passed the virus scan yet.
errors.tripDuplicateCode: Another trip in this account already uses that code.
errors.tripDuplicateExternalReference: Another trip in this account already uses that external reference.
errors.tripHasHistory: This trip has recorded activity and cannot be deleted. Cancel it instead.
errors.tripDriverNotAssignable: That driver cannot be assigned to this trip.
errors.routingNotConfigured: Route planning is not configured on this platform. Ask your administrator to set up the routing service.
errors.routingUnavailable: The routing service is not responding. The trip is unaffected — try planning again later.
errors.tollOverlappingTariff: A tariff already covers part of that date range for this station and vehicle class.
errors.tripShareRevoked: This tracking link has been revoked.

workforce.selectDriverHint: Select a driver to manage their credentials, devices, qualifications and assignments.

credentials.title: Driver Credentials & Devices
credentials.lockedUntilHelp: The driver cannot sign in until this moment.
credentials.revokeConfirm: Revoke this driver credential? The driver will no longer be able to sign in and existing sessions stop refreshing.
credentials.empty: This driver has no credential yet.

devices.title: Registered Devices
devices.revokeConfirm: Revoke this device registration? The device must be enrolled again from the driver app.
devices.empty: This driver has no registered devices.

qualifications.title: Driver Qualifications
qualifications.documentIdHelp: Optional supporting document, chosen from the documents held for this driver below.
qualifications.deleteConfirm: Delete this qualification? The record is removed permanently; its history stays in the audit trail.
qualifications.empty: No qualifications recorded for this driver.

assignments.title: Driver Assignments
assignments.endConfirm: End this assignment now? Ended assignments cannot be modified.
assignments.empty: No assignments match the current filters.
assignments.emptyActive: This driver has no active assignments.
assignments.tooManyResults: Showing the first {{count}} rows. Narrow the filters to see the rest.

expirations.title: Qualification Expirations (30 days)
expirations.empty: No qualifications expire within the next 30 days.

geofence.title: Geofences
geofence.name: Name
geofence.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this geofence?

validation.radiusRange: Radius must be between 10 and 100000 m
validation.dwellRange: Dwell threshold must be between 1 and 10080 min

geocodingProviders.title: Geocoding Providers
geocodingProviders.name: Name
geocodingProviders.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this geocoding provider?

group.title: Groups
group.name: Name
group.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this group?

help.title: Help
help.topicUnavailable: This help topic isn't available right now — browse the topics below.
help.unavailable: Help content isn't available right now. Please try again later.

operator.title: Operators
operator.name: Name
operator.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this operator?

poi.title: Points of Interest
poi.name: Name
poi.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this point of interest?
poi.invalidLatitude: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90
poi.invalidLongitude: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180

reports.title: Reports
reports.previewTruncated: Preview limited to the first {{count}} rows. Narrow your filters or export to Excel for the full dataset.
reports.noReports: No reports are available for your account.
reports.noPreviewRows: No data matches the selected filters.

reportDescriptions.liveReport: Latest known position of every unit in your account.
reportDescriptions.positionRecord: Historical position records for a unit over a date range.
reportDescriptions.transportersInGeofence: Units currently located inside a geofence.
reportDescriptions.geofenceEvents: Geofence entry and exit events for a unit over a date range.
reportDescriptions.gpsProviderHealthSummary: Uptime, latency, and failure summary per GPS provider.
reportDescriptions.gpsProviderSyncHistory: Per-run synchronization history for GPS providers.
reportDescriptions.gpsSyncStatistics: Daily synchronization statistics aggregated by provider.
reportDescriptions.gpsSynchronizedDeviceInventory: Full inventory of synchronized GPS devices and their assignment.
reportDescriptions.gpsRecentlyAddedDevices: GPS devices first detected within the selected window.
reportDescriptions.gpsUnassignedDevices: Synchronized GPS devices not yet assigned to a unit.
reportDescriptions.gpsIgnoredDevices: Synchronized GPS devices marked as ignored.
reportDescriptions.gpsAssignmentHistory: History of device-to-unit assignments over a date range.
reportDescriptions.gpsLatestPositionFreshness: How recently each device last reported a position.
reportDescriptions.gpsPositionHistory: Detailed position history for a unit or device.
reportDescriptions.documentsExpiring: Active documents expiring within the selected number of days.
reportDescriptions.documentsMissingRequired: Units missing one or more required document types.
reportDescriptions.documentsShareActivity: Public-link share activity and access counts for documents.
reportDescriptions.documentsUploadVolume: Document upload counts by category over a date range.
reportDescriptions.featureEnablementMatrix: Enabled features and tiers across all accounts.
reportDescriptions.groupMembershipExport: Group membership of users and units for your account.
reportDescriptions.workforceDriverRegistry: Complete driver registry with license, employee code and default unit.
reportDescriptions.workforceQualificationExpirations: Driver qualifications expiring within the selected number of days.
reportDescriptions.workforceAssignmentHistory: Time-bounded driver-to-unit assignment history over a date range.
reportDescriptions.tripSummary: Trips over a date range with planned versus actual start, end, distance and estimated toll.
reportDescriptions.tripDetail: Stop-level detail for each trip: planned window, arrival, departure, dwell and delivery outcomes.
reportDescriptions.tripOnTimePerformance: On-time percentage, average delay and delayed-stop counts by unit, driver and customer.
reportDescriptions.tripStopDwell: Dwell time distribution per stop and customer over a date range.
reportDescriptions.tripTollCost: Estimated toll by trip, route, station and vehicle class, flagging stations with no tariff.
reportDescriptions.tripPodExport: Proof-of-delivery register with receiver, capture time, location and document count.

settings.title: Settings
settings.saveMessage: Some settings may require a page refresh to take effect

transporter.title: Units
transporter.name: Name
transporter.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this unit?

user.title: Users
user.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

validation.selectValue: Please select a value for the {{field}} field
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter and a number

actions.syncNotCompleted: Sync did not complete. Check provider connectivity and try again.
actions.resetSyncConfirm: This will delete the synchronized devices for this operator and any units that only existed for those devices, then start a new sync. Continue?
actions.deleteDeviceConfirm: Delete this synchronized device? Assignment history remains available in audit logs.

assignmentForm.transporterHelp: Select the unit/asset that should use this GPS device.
assignmentForm.deviceHelp: Only devices not currently assigned to a unit are listed.

retention.managedNote: These storage settings depend on your subscription plan and are managed by the administrator.

empty.unassignedDevices: No unassigned GPS devices are available to assign.
empty.syncRuns: No sync runs in the selected window.

platformStatus.title: Platform Status
platformStatus.bookmarkHint: This page works without signing in — bookmark it so you can check it when you cannot log in.

detail.timeout: The service did not answer in time.
detail.unreachable: The service could not be reached.
detail.unhealthy: The service is reachable, but its database is not.
detail.httpError: The service answered with an error.
detail.nothingToSync: No account currently has GPS integration enabled, so there is nothing to synchronise.

authority.name: Sign-in
authority.description: Lets people log in to TrackHub.

security.name: Permissions
security.description: Decides what each person is allowed to see and do.

manager.name: Fleet management
manager.description: Vehicles, drivers, groups, documents and account settings.

router.name: GPS connections
router.description: Talks to your GPS providers to collect data.

telemetry.name: Position data
telemetry.description: Stores and serves vehicle positions and history.

geofencing.name: Geofences
geofencing.description: Watches entries, exits and stops inside your zones.

reporting.name: Reports
reporting.description: Builds the reports you download or preview.

syncWorker.name: GPS synchronisation
syncWorker.description: Keeps device lists and positions up to date in the background.

tripManagement.name: Trips
tripManagement.description: Plans routes, tracks trips and serves customer tracking links.

jobs.title: Background tasks
jobs.subtitle: Scheduled work that runs on its own. Many tasks only record activity when they actually had something to do.
jobs.empty: No background task has recorded activity yet.

manage.title: Platform announcements
manage.messageEsHint: Optional. Spanish users see the English message when this is empty.

errors.messageTooLong: Messages cannot be longer than {{max}} characters.
errors.windowInvalid: The end time must be later than the start time.

platformStatus.signInHint: Managers and administrators see more here after signing in — including GPS synchronisation.

trips.title: Trips
trips.selectTripHint: Select a trip to see its route, stops and history.
trips.deleteMessage: Delete this trip? Only trips with no recorded activity can be deleted.
trips.cancelMessage: Cancelling keeps the trip, its stops and its history. Give a reason.
trips.abortMessage: Aborting ends the trip where it is. Give a reason.
trips.forceComplete: Complete even though stops are still pending

routePlan.title: Route plan
routePlan.corridorHint: How far the vehicle may stray from the planned line before a deviation is raised.
routePlan.notPlanned: No route planned yet. Add at least one stop, then plan the route.
routePlan.failed: Route planning failed. The trip is still usable and stop ETAs fall back to the planned schedule.

timeline.title: History
timeline.empty: Nothing has happened on this trip yet.

deliveries.title: Deliveries
deliveries.outcomeMessage: Record what happened with {{delivery}}. Saving again after a failure updates the same record — it never creates a second outcome.
deliveries.stopContext: Stop: {{stop}}. A delivery cannot be moved to another stop.
deliveries.deleteMessage: Delete this delivery line? Proof of delivery already captured for the stop is kept.
deliveries.empty: No deliveries are registered on this trip.

replay.title: Route replay
replay.truncated: Only the first {{count}} points are shown — this trip has more history than the replay limit. Narrow the trip or use the position history report for the full track.
replay.empty: No positions were recorded for this trip.

tripStops.title: Stops
tripStops.name: Name
tripStops.addressHint: Internal only. The full address is never sent to a customer tracking link.
tripStops.cityHint: The only location detail a shared tracking link can show. Filled in from the map; edit it if you prefer another wording.
tripStops.cityTooLong: The city cannot be longer than {{max}} characters.
tripStops.arrivalRadiusHint: How close the vehicle must get for an automatic arrival to be detected.
tripStops.empty: This trip has no stops yet.

placement.title: Where is this stop?
placement.mapHint: Click anywhere on the map to place the stop. The address is filled in for you.
placement.noSearch: There is no address search: stops are placed from the map, a point of interest, or a geofence.

tripStops.reorderHint: Drag a stop, or use the arrows, to change the visit order.
tripStops.skipMessage: Give a reason for skipping this stop.
tripStops.removeMessage: Remove this stop from the trip?

tripShare.title: Share with the customer
tripShare.includeLivePosition: Live position (while the trip is running)
tripShare.includePodSummary: Whether each stop has proof of delivery
tripShare.fieldsHint: Only the boxes you tick are sent to the customer. Costs, tolls, internal notes and full stop addresses are never shared.
tripShare.routeIncludedHint: The customer will see the planned route drawn on the map.
tripShare.routeExcludedHint: The customer will not see the planned route. The map still shows the live position if you shared it.
tripShare.tokenWarning: Copy this link now — the token is shown once and cannot be retrieved again.
tripShare.revokeMessage: The customer will immediately stop being able to open this link. Continue?
tripShare.nothingShared: nothing beyond the trip code and status
tripShare.empty: This trip has not been shared yet.

pod.title: Proof of delivery
pod.empty: No proof of delivery has been captured on this trip.
pod.locationHint: Optional. Where the goods were handed over, if you know it.
pod.noDeliveries: This stop has no delivery lines, so the proof of delivery covers the whole stop.
pod.deliveryHint: Leave the delivery empty to mark every delivery on this stop as delivered. Naming one delivery leaves the others untouched.
pod.documentsHint: Signatures, photos and receipts are uploaded as normal documents and attached to this record. A file can only be attached once its virus scan reports Clean.
pod.notCleanWarning: {{count}} attachment(s) have not been scanned clean yet. The capture will be rejected until they are — re-check them or remove them.

tolls.title: Toll estimate
tolls.noEstimateYet: Plan the route to estimate tolls.
tolls.partialWarning: Partial estimate: {{count}} station(s) on this route have no tariff for this vehicle class, so the real cost is higher than the figure shown.
tolls.noStationsHint: No toll stations in the catalog match this route, so there is no estimate — not a cost of zero.
tolls.notComputedHint: Tolls have not been calculated for this route plan.
tolls.mixedCurrencyHint: This route crosses stations priced in different currencies, so no single total is meaningful. Each station's own amount and currency are listed below.

transporterClass.title: Transporter toll classes
transporterClass.description: Map your vehicle types — or one specific vehicle — to a toll vehicle class. New trips take their toll class from this mapping, so without it a route plan is priced with no class and the toll estimate never engages.
transporterClass.appliesHint: The mapping applies to trips created from now on. Trips that already exist keep the class they were created with.
transporterClass.savedHint: Only the mappings written from this dialog are listed: the service does not yet expose a query to read the existing ones back.
transporterClass.noClasses: There are no toll vehicle classes yet. A platform administrator has to define them in the toll catalog before a vehicle can be mapped.

catalog.title: Toll catalog
catalog.name: Name
catalog.historyHint: Superseded tariffs stay visible so a past trip’s estimate can still be reproduced.
catalog.deactivateClassMessage: Deactivate this vehicle class? Existing tariffs and past estimates are kept.
catalog.deactivateStationMessage: Deactivate this station? It stops matching new routes; history is kept.
catalog.selectStation: Select a station to see and edit its tariffs.
catalog.pickOnMapHint: Click the map to set the station coordinates, or type them below.
catalog.emptyClasses: No vehicle classes yet. The platform ships none — add the classes your tariffs use.
catalog.emptyStations: No toll stations yet. Add them one by one, or import a CSV file.
catalog.emptyTariffs: This station has no tariffs yet.
catalog.importHint: Paste or upload a CSV with one row per station tariff. Rows that fail are reported individually — the valid rows are still imported.

tripTracking.title: Trip tracking
tripTracking.noLivePosition: Live position is shown while the trip is running.
tripTracking.notFoundTitle: This tracking link is not valid
tripTracking.notFoundBody: The link may have been revoked, or it may be for a trip that no longer exists. Ask the sender for a new link.
tripTracking.expiredBody: Tracking links stop working after the date set by the sender. Ask them for a new one.
tripTracking.invalidLinkBody: Part of the link is missing. Open the full link exactly as it was sent to you.
tripTracking.unavailableBody: We could not reach the tracking service. Please try again in a few minutes.
